title: Localize application to Portuguese (Brazil) and restrict timeframes to M1/M5/M10

requirements.text: Translate all frontend user-facing text to Portuguese (Brazil). Replace all English text with Portuguese equivalents: 'Analyze Chart' → 'Analisar Gráfico', 'Analysis History' → 'Histórico de Análises', 'Settings' → 'Configurações', 'AI System Status' → 'Status da IA', 'Active' → 'Ativo', 'Trend Detection' → 'Detecção de Tendência', 'Buy' → 'Compra', 'Sell' → 'Venda', 'Confidence' → 'Confiança', 'Processing' → 'Processando', 'Upload' → 'Enviar Gráfico', and all other UI elements including buttons, titles, messages, notifications, and labels.
acceptanceCriteria: All UI text throughout the application is displayed in Portuguese (Brazil)
No English text remains in buttons, titles, messages, or notifications
Translation mappings provided in the user request are applied consistently
Dashboard buttons display 'Analisar Gráfico', 'Histórico de Análises', and 'Configurações'
AI status displays 'Status da IA' with 'Ativo' when active
Results screen shows 'COMPRA' or 'VENDA' for signals
Processing stages are translated to Portuguese
Settings labels and options are in Portuguese

requirements.text: Restrict timeframe selection to only three options: M1 (1 minuto), M5 (5 minutos), and M10 (10 minutos). Remove all longer timeframe periods (15m, 30m, 1h, etc.) from the settings and default timeframe selection. Set M1 as the automatic default timeframe.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page timeframe selector displays only M1, M5, and M10 options with Portuguese labels
M1 is selected by default when user first accesses settings
No timeframes longer than 10 minutes are available for selection
Backend AnalysisResult includes only M1, M5, or M10 as suggested timeframes
All existing longer timeframe options are removed from the codebase

requirements.text: Update the Results screen to display the suggested timeframe (M1, M5, or M10) based on the user's configured default setting, and add directional arrow symbols (↑ for buy, ↓ for sell) next to the COMPRA/VENDA signal labels for enhanced visual clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: Results screen shows suggested timeframe matching user's default setting from Settings
Buy signals display with '↑' arrow symbol next to 'COMPRA'
Sell signals display with '↓' arrow symbol next to 'VENDA'
Timeframe label is displayed in Portuguese (e.g., '1 minuto', '5 minutos', '10 minutos')

requirements.text: Update the Settings screen to display fixed Portuguese (Português) as the language option, remove language selection controls, and ensure timeframe labels use Portuguese terminology: 'Selecionar timeframe padrão' with options 'M1 (1 minuto)', 'M5 (5 minutos)', 'M10 (10 minutos)', and 'Sensibilidade da IA' for AI sensitivity.
acceptanceCriteria: Language selection control is removed from Settings page
Language is fixed to Portuguese (Brasil) throughout the app
Timeframe setting label reads 'Selecionar timeframe padrão'
Timeframe options display as 'M1 (1 minuto)', 'M5 (5 minutos)', 'M10 (10 minutos)'
AI sensitivity setting label reads 'Sensibilidade da IA'

requirements.text: Update the ProcessingScreen to display all four processing stages in Portuguese: 'Carregando imagem' (Loading image), 'Processando dados' (Processing data), 'Detectando padrões' (Detecting patterns), and 'Gerando resultado' (Generating result), maintaining the sequential animation flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Processing screen displays all stage labels in Portuguese
Stage 1 shows 'Carregando imagem'
Stage 2 shows 'Processando dados'
Stage 3 shows 'Detectando padrões'
Stage 4 shows 'Gerando resultado'
Animation sequence and timing remain unchanged

requirements.text: Translate the Results screen labels and content to Portuguese: display 'Tendência' for trend with values 'ALTA', 'BAIXA', or 'LATERAL'; show 'Padrões detectados' section with pattern names in Portuguese; and ensure all explanatory text is in Portuguese (Brazil).
acceptanceCriteria: Trend section displays 'Tendência' as the label
Trend values show 'ALTA', 'BAIXA', or 'LATERAL' in Portuguese
Detected patterns section header reads 'Padrões detectados'
Pattern names are translated to Portuguese
All explanatory text and descriptions are in Portuguese (Brazil)
Save and share button labels are in Portuguese

requirements.text: Update the AnalyzeChart page to display Portuguese labels: change 'Upload' to 'Enviar Gráfico', translate all file upload instructions and prompts to Portuguese, and ensure camera capture, gallery selection, clipboard paste, and drag-and-drop interfaces display Portuguese text.
acceptanceCriteria: Main upload button or section displays 'Enviar Gráfico'
File selection instructions are in Portuguese
Camera capture interface displays Portuguese labels
Gallery selection prompts are in Portuguese
Clipboard paste instructions are in Portuguese
Drag-and-drop area text is in Portuguese
File type and size limit messages are in Portuguese

requirements.text: Translate the History page to Portuguese: change 'Analysis History' header to 'Histórico de Análises', translate empty state message prompting users to analyze their first chart, and ensure all date/time stamps and analysis summary text display in Portuguese format.
acceptanceCriteria: Page header displays 'Histórico de Análises'
Empty state message is in Portuguese
Historical analysis entries show labels in Portuguese
Date and time formatting follows Portuguese (Brazil) conventions
Signal labels in history items display 'COMPRA' or 'VENDA'

requirements.text: Update the Dashboard page to display Portuguese labels: 'Analisar Gráfico' for the analyze button, 'Histórico de Análises' for history button, 'Configurações' for settings button, and 'Status da IA' with 'Ativo' for the AI status indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze chart button displays 'Analisar Gráfico'
History button displays 'Histórico de Análises'
Settings button displays 'Configurações'
AI status section shows 'Status da IA'
Active status displays 'Ativo' in Portuguese
App branding and titles are in Portuguese

constraints: All user-facing text must be in Portuguese (Brazil) with no English text remaining
Only M1, M5, and M10 timeframes are allowed; all longer periods must be removed
M1 must be the default timeframe selection
Maintain the existing minimalist black/white/gray theme and professional trading interface
Processing time target remains under 3 seconds
Do not modify the authentication hooks (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts) or UI component library (frontend/src/components/ui)
nonGoals: Adding new timeframe options beyond M1, M5, M10
Supporting multiple languages or language switching functionality
Changing the visual theme or color scheme
Modifying the AI analysis algorithm or processing logic beyond localization
Adding new features not related to Portuguese localization or timeframe restrictions
